briefdescription.para: This function stores the Sha3 initialize state as initialized if the current state is uninitialized.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Sha3 state is changed to initialized state
XST_FAILURE If the Sha3 is not in uninitialized state

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update the SHA3 engine with the input data.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the output buffer to store the output hash
Size of the data to be updated to SHA3 engine

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the update is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Validate Sha3state. Return XST_FAILURE if the state is not XSECURE_SHA_UNINITIALIZED
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request final data to SHA3 engine which includes SHA3 padding and reads final hash.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the output buffer to store the output hash

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If finished without any errors
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Validate Sha3state. Return XST_FAILURE if the state is XSECURE_SHA_UNINITIALIZED
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 InDataAddr, const u64 OutDataAddr, u32 Size)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha3Digest

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to calculate hash on single block of data.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the input buffer where the input data is stored
Address of the output buffer to store the output hash
Size of the data to be updated to SHA3 engine

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the sha3 hash calculation is successful
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_FAILURE if input parameters are invalid
Initialize SHA3
Fill Payload
Send request to PLM through generic request API. This internally handles SMC or IPI mailbox based on build configuration.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for SHA driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kal 03/23/21 Initial release 4.5 kal 03/23/20 Updated file version to sync with library version kal 03/28/21 Added XSecure_Sha3Digest Client API kpt 05/02/21 Updated XSecure_Sha3Update function to accept multiple data update requests from user and maintained sha driver state using XSecure_ShaState 4.6 kal 08/22/21 Updated doxygen comment description for XSecure_Sha3Initialize API kpt 03/16/22 Removed IPI related code and added mailbox support 5.0 kpt 07/24/22 Moved XSecure_Sha3Kat into xsecure_katclient.c 5.2 am 03/09/23 Replaced xsecure payload lengths with xmailbox payload lengths yog 05/03/23 Fixed MISRA C violation of Rule 12.2 yog 05/04/23 Fixed HIS COMF violations 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen warnings pre 08/29/24 APIs are updated for SSIT support 5.6 vss 09/06/25 Updated SHA init API to initialise whenever it is called. 5.7 tbk 03/16/26 Added SMC support
